message: TRUE_FALSE_TABLE questions not displaying in Practice mode; MULTIPLE_CHOICE result colors not rendering after check
root_cause: (1) PracticeScreen rendered inline options without QuestionView component, missing TRUE_FALSE_TABLE support. (2) QuestionView used ternary operator for styling that caused TailwindMerge to override green/red result classes with white background.
fix_applied: Refactored PracticeScreen to use QuestionView component with multi-select toggle, deferred check button, and exact-match evaluation. Rewrote QuestionView styling with explicit if/else logic. Added correct answer summary section.

message: Edit question button navigates to create screen instead of edit screen - form not populated
root_cause: CreateQuestionScreen did not use useParams() to read :id from URL. No edit-mode logic existed - no data loading, no db.questions.update(), always showed create-only UI.
fix_applied: Added useParams/useEffect/useLocation to CreateQuestionScreen. When :id param exists: loads question data via db.questions.get(), populates all form fields, uses db.questions.update() on save, shows 'Sua Cau Hoi' header, hides tabs, changes button to 'Cap Nhat Cau Hoi'.

message: Property dropdowns not syncing with PropertySettingsScreen - hardcoded options
root_cause: ManageExamsScreen used hardcoded <option> values instead of useLiveQuery on propertyOptions table. PracticeSelectionScreen derived dropdowns only from subjects, missing newly-created properties.
fix_applied: Replaced hardcoded options with useLiveQuery(db.propertyOptions). Merged property DB options with subject-derived values in PracticeSelectionScreen.

message: Parent subjects show 0 questions - child questions not loaded
root_cause: QuestionDetailScreen used db.questions.where('subjectId').equals() which only matches direct children, not recursive descendants.
fix_applied: Replaced with db.getQuestionsBySubjectRecursive() which collects all descendant subject IDs and fetches all their questions.

message: Missing edit subject screen in question bank context menu
root_cause: SubjectTree context menu only had 'Xem chi tiết' and 'Xóa bộ đề'. No edit option existed.
fix_applied: Added 'Chỉnh sửa' menu option with inline edit dialog (name, examTerm, level, type fields with live property options from DB).

message: QuestionStatus is not exported by src/components/QuestionNav.tsx
root_cause: Named import of type alias combined with value export in a way that confused Vite/Rollup tree-shaking
fix_applied: Used 'import type { QuestionStatus }' explicitly in importing files.

message: React has detected a change in the order of Hooks called
root_cause: Hooks (useSwipeNavigation, useCallback) were placed after conditional return statements in the component body.
fix_applied: Moved all hook calls to the top of the component functions, before any conditional returns.

message: Explanation text renders as a single block, ignoring line breaks.
root_cause:
Explanation was rendered inside a single

tag without whitespace-pre-line, causing all newlines and spaces to collapse.
fix_applied:
Modified QuestionView.tsx to use whitespace-pre-line and split the text by newlines/separators to render multiple

tags.

message: Slow preset exam startup - sequential getQuestionsBySubjectRecursive calls
root_cause: Sequential for-loop with await, each loading all subjects. N+1 DB queries.
fix_applied: Added batch method getQuestionsByMultipleSubjectsRecursive (2 queries total) + loading spinner.

message: Timer not resetting, sub-answers lost, review screen empty
root_cause: startNextSubject missing nextSubject() call; finishAll saved empty userSubAnswers; ReviewExamScreen read empty object.
fix_applied: Added nextSubject() call, extract sub-answers from userAnswers JSON, ReviewExamScreen fallback parsing.
